title: Demo cycle 1 — full funnel — round 2 (expand)
prompt: Your last response landed: the brainstorm moved forward: 5 syntheses of Classic bulb × Idea in a bubble — nothing unselected was re-shown. Select what resonates — the pool GROWS with new syntheses; nothing is removed. Pool: 5 options.

options.label: Speaking bulb
options.description: Meaning synthesis: an idea that talks
